title: Brig ConfigMap
description: Schema for Wire brig (user accounts service) configuration. Derived from Haskell source: services/brig/src/Brig/Options.hs at chart/5.22.52

logNetStrings.description: Optional. Deprecated in favor of logFormat. [source: services/brig/src/Brig/Options.hs:430 @chart/5.22.52]

randomPrekeys.description: Optional. Enable random prekey strategy. [source: services/brig/src/Brig/Options.hs:405 @chart/5.22.52]

wireServerEnterprise.description: Optional. Wire Server Enterprise endpoint. [source: services/brig/src/Brig/Options.hs:387 @chart/5.22.52]

elasticsearch.description: ElasticSearch connection. Requires url (not host/port). [source: services/brig/src/Brig/Options.hs:393 @chart/5.22.52]

url.description: ES server URL, e.g. https://elasticsearch:9200 [source: services/brig/src/Brig/Options.hs:64 @chart/5.22.52]

credentials.description: File path to ES credentials [source: services/brig/src/Brig/Options.hs:82 @chart/5.22.52]

postgresql.description: PostgreSQL connection as libpq key=value map. Typical keys: host, port, user, dbname, password, sslmode. [source: services/brig/src/Brig/Options.hs:396 @chart/5.22.52]

postgresqlPassword.description: Optional. File path to PostgreSQL password. [source: services/brig/src/Brig/Options.hs:397 @chart/5.22.52]

rabbitmq.description: Optional. RabbitMQ endpoint. Required when federation is enabled. [source: services/brig/src/Brig/Options.hs:401 @chart/5.22.52]

email.description: Either AWS SES config (sesQueue + sesEndpoint) or SMTP config (smtpEndpoint + smtpConnType). Parser tries AWS first, then SMTP.

serversSource.description: When 'files': servers + serversV2 required. When 'dns': baseDomain required. [source: services/brig/src/Brig/Options.hs:303 @chart/5.22.52]

secret.description: File path to TURN shared secret [source: services/brig/src/Brig/Options.hs:305 @chart/5.22.52]

tokenTTL.description: TURN credential validity in seconds [source: services/brig/src/Brig/Options.hs:308 @chart/5.22.52]

configTTL.description: TURN config fetch interval in seconds [source: services/brig/src/Brig/Options.hs:311 @chart/5.22.52]

sft.description: Optional. SFT (Ogg conference calling) settings. [source: services/brig/src/Brig/Options.hs:437 @chart/5.22.52]

setStomp.description: File path to STOMP secrets [source: services/brig/src/Brig/Options.hs:455 @chart/5.22.52]

setDisabledAPIVersions.description: Array of version strings: v0..v12 or 'development' [source: services/brig/src/Brig/Options.hs:564 @chart/5.22.52]

setPasswordHashingOptions.description: When algorithm=argon2id: iterations, memory, parallelism are required. When algorithm=scrypt: no additional fields. [source: services/brig/src/Brig/Options.hs:598 @chart/5.22.52]

inverseRate.description: Microseconds per operation; 0 = no rate limiting
